metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the premium long-haul airline domain.

children.name: Offer, Pricing & Availability Management
children.description: Builds the governed flight offer layer across schedules, cabins, fares, and inventory availability.

internalModules.title: Offer construction engine
internalModules.description: Combines schedule, fare, and inventory rules into retail-ready offers.

internalModules.title: Fare rule governance
internalModules.description: Controls branded fare conditions, change rules, and market-specific commercial logic.

interfaces.title: Retail Offer API
interfaces.description: Returns priced, available flight offers for owned and controlled channels.

interfaces.title: Offer performance dashboard
interfaces.description: Commercial workspace for monitoring search, conversion, and availability health.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on shared integration to consume schedule and inventory updates.
Uses data models to evaluate offer quality and retail performance.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Passenger service system and inventory hosts
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Reads schedule, fare, and inventory state from the airline reservation landscape.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Owned retail channels and partner distribution
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Commerce channels depend on this brick to build bookable offers.

children.name: Ancillary, Seat & Upgrade Merchandising
children.description: Monetizes seats, bags, lounges, upgrades, and premium extras throughout the booking and servicing journey.

internalModules.title: Ancillary pricing rules
internalModules.description: Controls pricing and eligibility logic for ancillary offers.

internalModules.title: Seat and upgrade inventory service
internalModules.description: Exposes seat maps and upgrade opportunities across channels.

interfaces.title: Ancillary Offer API
interfaces.description: Serves ancillary and upgrade options in shopping and manage-booking flows.

interfaces.title: Merchandising workspace
interfaces.description: Controls placement, prioritization, and experiment design for extras and upgrades.

brickDependencies.description: Uses base itinerary and fare context before attaching extras.
Uses member and tier data to tailor benefit-led merchandising.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Seat map and ancillary host systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Reads seat and ancillary availability from airline inventory systems.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to present extras and upgrade paths.

children.name: Order Servicing & Ticket Lifecycle
children.description: Owns booking creation, post-booking changes, cancellations, ticketing states, and refund-related order flows.

internalModules.title: Order state manager
internalModules.description: Maintains the canonical order and servicing state across the booking lifecycle.

internalModules.title: Ticketing and refund workflow engine
internalModules.description: Coordinates ticket issuance, exchange, cancellation, and refund workflows.

interfaces.title: Order Service API
interfaces.description: Supports manage-booking and agent servicing flows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses payment and refund services to complete servicing transactions.
Needs partner continuity data for mixed-carrier itineraries.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Coordinates with core reservation and ticketing systems.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use the order service to change, cancel, and reissue bookings.

children.name: Identity, Profile & Document Readiness
children.description: Connects traveller identity, profile data, contact preferences, and travel-readiness information to every journey.

internalModules.title: Customer profile store
internalModules.description: Maintains identity, contact, and preference data for recognised travellers.

internalModules.title: Document readiness workflow
internalModules.description: Tracks passport, visa, and destination-entry readiness before departure.

interfaces.title: Identity and profile API
interfaces.description: Serves profile, consent, and travel-readiness context across channels.

brickDependencies.description: Uses the event backbone to propagate profile and booking changes.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Identity providers and travel-document verification services
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Relies on identity and document-validation services where required.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Retail, loyalty, airport, and care experiences
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to personalise journeys and prevent document-related failure.

children.name: Loyalty, Tier & Partner Rewards
children.description: Runs points, status tiers, benefits, partner earning, and reward redemption flows.

internalModules.title: Points and tier ledger
internalModules.description: Records points balances, earning, redemption, and tier progression.

internalModules.title: Rewards eligibility engine
internalModules.description: Determines benefit, reward-seat, and upgrade eligibility.

interfaces.title: Loyalty account API
interfaces.description: Exposes balances, tiers, and reward actions to channels and partners.

interfaces.title: Member workspace
interfaces.description: Supports account management, partner earning visibility, and reward usage.

brickDependencies.description: Needs partner connectivity for multi-brand earning and redemption.
Uses data models to understand member value and engagement.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Synchronizes loyalty actions and balances with approved partners.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to recognise status and make rewards actionable.

children.name: Trip Companion & Proactive Notifications
children.description: Delivers trip-state visibility, airport guidance, and proactive notifications before and during travel.

internalModules.title: Trip-state timeline
internalModules.description: Builds the guest-facing state model of the journey across touchpoints.

internalModules.title: Notification orchestration
internalModules.description: Routes messages by trip event, urgency, and channel preference.

interfaces.title: Trip timeline API
interfaces.description: Serves live trip milestones to mobile and web channels.

brickDependencies.description: Consumes journey state changes from operational and booking systems.
Uses traveller identity and communication preferences.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Flight status, airport, and messaging systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes status updates and publishes notifications through approved messaging providers.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Mobile app and web trip experiences
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick for pre-travel and day-of-travel visibility.

children.name: Disruption Recovery & Self-Service Reaccommodation
children.description: Coordinates digital and assisted recovery when flights are delayed, cancelled, or broken by missed connections.

internalModules.title: Recovery eligibility engine
internalModules.description: Determines which options can be offered to which guests under operational and policy constraints.

internalModules.title: Reaccommodation workflow manager
internalModules.description: Coordinates self-service and agent-assisted reaccommodation paths.

interfaces.title: Recovery Options API
interfaces.description: Returns guest-specific disruption recovery choices and next actions.

brickDependencies.description: Uses network-disruption context to prioritize recovery paths.
Needs order servicing to complete rebooking and exchange actions.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Reservation, schedule-change, and airport servicing systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Coordinates recovery options with airline servicing and airport constraints.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to resolve passenger disruption quickly.

children.name: Airport, Baggage & Ground Journey Orchestration
children.description: Connects airport execution, baggage states, and ground handling context to guest recovery and travel readiness.

internalModules.title: Airport readiness state model
internalModules.description: Tracks the critical airport and ground-handling states that affect guest movement.

internalModules.title: Baggage exception workflow
internalModules.description: Coordinates tracing, exception handling, and closure of baggage issues.

interfaces.title: Ground journey API
interfaces.description: Provides airport and baggage state to digital and agent experiences.

brickDependencies.description: Pushes airport and baggage context into guest trip experiences.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Airport, departure control, and baggage systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes airport and baggage events from the operational landscape.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to close the loop between airport execution and customer servicing.

children.name: Customer Care & Case Management
children.description: Supports assisted servicing, escalations, and cross-functional resolution when customer issues require human coordination.

internalModules.title: Case intake and routing
internalModules.description: Creates and routes customer cases by journey type, issue class, and priority.

internalModules.title: Context aggregation service
internalModules.description: Pulls booking, loyalty, disruption, and baggage context into the case view.

interfaces.title: Agent workspace
interfaces.description: Service interface for customer care, airport agents, and specialist support teams.

brickDependencies.description: Uses recovery context to resolve customer-facing cases.
Needs traveller identity and contact data in every case.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Integrates with service channels and communication platforms.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Holiday, disruption, and cargo support teams
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to resolve customer exceptions across lines of business.

children.name: Holidays Packaging & Fulfilment
children.description: Packages flights, accommodation, transfers, and extras into sellable and serviceable holiday products.

internalModules.title: Package assembly engine
internalModules.description: Builds holiday combinations from flight and non-flight inventory.

internalModules.title: Holiday fulfilment workflow
internalModules.description: Coordinates booking confirmation, supplier handoff, and amendment handling.

interfaces.title: Holiday package API
interfaces.description: Exposes searchable and bookable package combinations.

brickDependencies.description: Needs flight offer context inside the package product.
Uses shared payment and refund capability for package lifecycle events.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Connects to hotel and destination suppliers for package fulfilment.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to retail and service package products.

children.name: Corporate, Agency & NDC Distribution
children.description: Controls commercial content, contract logic, and servicing pathways across indirect and managed-travel channels.

internalModules.title: Distribution policy layer
internalModules.description: Applies account, channel, and contract rules to distributed content.

internalModules.title: NDC and agency gateway
internalModules.description: Publishes content and servicing functions through commercial APIs.

interfaces.title: Distribution API
interfaces.description: Exposes controlled offer and servicing capabilities to approved commercial partners.

brickDependencies.description: Uses governed retail offers as the source of distributed content.
Needs partner itinerary context for mixed-carrier distribution and servicing.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Travel management companies and agency systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Connects to agency and managed-travel channels.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Sales, account management, and partner channels
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to distribute and monitor managed-travel content.

children.name: Partner & Alliance Journey Orchestration
children.description: Coordinates itinerary continuity, servicing context, and commercial logic across alliance, JV, codeshare, and selected cargo partners.

internalModules.title: Partner rules engine
internalModules.description: Stores partner-specific logic for continuity, servicing, and handoffs.

internalModules.title: Partner event and message broker
internalModules.description: Manages partner-facing itinerary and recovery messaging.

interfaces.title: Partner continuity service
interfaces.description: Exposes partner-aware itinerary and servicing context to internal products.

brickDependencies.description: Uses the shared integration layer for partner eventing.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Alliance, JV, codeshare, and cargo partner systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Relies on partner systems for joint itinerary and continuity data.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Retail, servicing, distribution, and cargo products
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick whenever journeys or shipments extend beyond own-metal operations.

children.name: Payments, Refunds & Revenue Settlement
children.description: Runs collection, refund, reconciliation, and settlement across passenger, holiday, and cargo transactions.

internalModules.title: Payment orchestration
internalModules.description: Coordinates payment methods, authorizations, and captures across channels.

internalModules.title: Refund and settlement engine
internalModules.description: Handles refunds, partner settlement, and financial reconciliation workflows.

interfaces.title: Payment workflow API
interfaces.description: Supports checkout, servicing, and finance workflows requiring transaction control.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared eventing to propagate transaction states across products.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Payment gateways, finance, and reconciliation systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Connects to payment and finance platforms for financial execution.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Passenger, holiday, cargo, and care products
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to complete commercial and servicing transactions.

children.name: Operational Control Tower
children.description: Creates the integrated operating view of network health, disruption risk, and intervention priorities.

internalModules.title: Network risk monitor
internalModules.description: Tracks flight, station, and connection risk in real time.

internalModules.title: Intervention workflow board
internalModules.description: Helps control teams assign and track recovery actions.

interfaces.title: Operations control workspace
interfaces.description: Real-time workspace for IOC and station control teams.

brickDependencies.description: Uses data models to prioritize risk by guest and revenue impact.
Consumes real-time operational changes through the event backbone.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Operations control, airport, and schedule systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Reads real-time operational state from core airline systems.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.interface: Operations control workspace and event feeds
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to understand current network priorities.

children.name: Crew & Aircraft Recovery Optimization
children.description: Supports aircraft and crew recovery decisions that protect the schedule and minimize guest impact.

internalModules.title: Recovery simulation engine
internalModules.description: Evaluates feasible aircraft and crew recovery scenarios.

internalModules.title: Legality and rotation rule layer
internalModules.description: Applies crew legality and operational constraints to recovery choices.

interfaces.title: Recovery decision API
interfaces.description: Provides ranked recovery options to operations teams.

brickDependencies.description: Uses network-risk context to focus recovery efforts.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Crew management and fleet operations systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes crew and aircraft state required for recovery calculations.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Operations control and disruption recovery workflows
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to select recovery paths under disruption.

children.name: Cargo Capacity, Quote & Booking
children.description: Owns cargo quoting, product selection, booking, and commercial control across the long-haul network.

internalModules.title: Cargo quote engine
internalModules.description: Calculates rates and service choices for cargo demand.

internalModules.title: Capacity booking workflow
internalModules.description: Coordinates capacity confirmation, acceptance, and booking changes.

interfaces.title: Cargo booking API
interfaces.description: Supports digital quote and booking experiences for cargo customers.

brickDependencies.description: Uses partner capacity and continuity logic where cargo journeys span multiple carriers.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Reads and updates cargo inventory and shipment bookings.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Cargo digital portal and commercial teams
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to quote and secure cargo capacity.

children.name: Cargo Tracking & Exception Management
children.description: Tracks shipment milestones, exposes visibility, and routes operational cargo exceptions for resolution.

internalModules.title: Milestone event processor
internalModules.description: Builds the shipment timeline from operational cargo events.

internalModules.title: Cargo exception workflow
internalModules.description: Routes handling or network exceptions to the right cargo support path.

interfaces.title: Cargo tracking API
interfaces.description: Returns shipment milestones, alerts, and exception states.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shipment and booking context from cargo booking workflows.
Escalates high-touch shipment cases into customer care when needed.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Cargo handling, warehouse, and movement systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes movement and handling events from cargo operations systems.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to monitor shipments and act on exceptions.

children.name: Operational Data, Revenue & Personalisation Platform
children.description: Creates the shared data, KPI, and decision-support layer for commercial, operational, and guest experiences.

internalModules.title: Unified airline data model
internalModules.description: Standardizes guest, booking, operational, and revenue entities for analytics and decisioning.

internalModules.title: Insight and personalisation models
internalModules.description: Supports KPI reporting, prioritization, and personalised next-best actions.

interfaces.title: Data products and KPI workspace
interfaces.description: Provides curated datasets and dashboards to teams across the airline.

brickDependencies.description: Relies on shared ingestion and eventing to populate the platform.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Enterprise data warehouse and ML tooling
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Uses the organization's shared data and modeling stack.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.system: Commercial, operations, loyalty, and care teams
externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use this brick to monitor performance and inform decisions.

children.name: Integration & Event Backbone
children.description: Provides the shared eventing, API mediation, and integration patterns required across airline products.

internalModules.title: Domain event bus
internalModules.description: Carries booking, journey, operations, loyalty, and cargo events across the portfolio.

internalModules.title: Connector and mediation layer
internalModules.description: Provides reusable adapters for legacy airline systems and partner integrations.

interfaces.title: Event subscription and integration APIs
interfaces.description: Shared integration entry points for internal teams and approved partner workflows.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.system: Legacy airline systems, partner platforms, and internal services
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Connects the modern product layer to the broader enterprise and partner landscape.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Depend on this brick for timely, reusable system connectivity.
